text: I feel like I am inhabiting a threshold between order and curiosity. The modern, immaculate lines of the architecture invite both contemplation and anticipation as I pass into a space dedicated to R+D—research and development. Here, technology and human thought are celebrated, the air buzzing gently with innovation. I can sense the weight of possibility and the gentle hum of progress, urging me to question how humans and machines can learn from one another, and what it means to truly connect.
